All Classes and Interfaces

Classes
Class
Description
Admin
Represents an Admin user in the TicketMiner system.
Arena
Represents an Arena venue in the TicketMiner system.
Auditorium
Represents an Auditorium venue in the TicketMiner system.
Concert
 
Customer
Represents a Customer user in the TicketMiner system.
DataManager
 
Event
Abstract base class representing a generic event in the TicketMiner system.
Logger
 
OpenAir
Represents an Open Air venue in the TicketMiner system.
Organizer
Represents an Organizer user in the TicketMiner system.
RunTicketMiner
 
Special
 
Sport
 
Stadium
Represents a Stadium venue in the TicketMiner system.
User
Abstract base class representing a generic user in the TicketMiner system.
Venue
Abstract base class representing a generic venue in the TicketMiner system.
